name: Almeda Ventures Limited Partnership
summary: Almeda Ventures Limited Partnership is a venture capital firm specializing in seed, start up, early venture and middle market investments. The firm seeks to invest in health technology with focus on public R&D partnership, medical devices, digital health and bio-convergence; life sciences research and development company. It prefers to invest in Israel, USA and Europe. Almeda Ventures Limited Partnership was founded in 2020 and is based in Tel Aviv, Israel.
